#!/bin/bash
# VYVA Frontend Setup Script
# Run from your Replit project ROOT (where package.json lives):
#   bash vyva_setup.sh
#
# This script creates 29 TypeScript/TSX files in the correct
# folder structure for the VYVA onboarding module.
set -e
echo "🚀 Creating VYVA frontend files..."

mkdir -p src
mkdir -p src/components/onboarding
mkdir -p src/pages/onboarding
mkdir -p src/pages/onboarding/sections
mkdir -p src/pages/settings

echo "  Writing src/App.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/App.tsx
echo "  Writing src/components/onboarding/CategoryFilterBar.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/components/onboarding/CategoryFilterBar.tsx
echo "  Writing src/components/onboarding/ChipSelector.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/components/onboarding/ChipSelector.tsx
echo "  Writing src/components/onboarding/PhoneFrame.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/components/onboarding/PhoneFrame.tsx
echo "  Writing src/components/onboarding/SectionCard.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/components/onboarding/SectionCard.tsx
echo "  Writing src/components/onboarding/ToggleRow.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/components/onboarding/ToggleRow.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/ActivationStep.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/ActivationStep.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/BasicsStep.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/BasicsStep.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/ChannelStep.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/ChannelStep.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/DataConsentStep.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/DataConsentStep.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/ProfileOverview.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/ProfileOverview.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/SectionCompleteScreen.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/SectionCompleteScreen.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/WelcomeScreen.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/WelcomeScreen.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/AddressSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/AddressSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/CareTeamFlow.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/CareTeamFlow.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/CognitiveSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/CognitiveSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/ConditionsSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/ConditionsSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/DevicesSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/DevicesSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/DietSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/DietSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/EmergencySection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/EmergencySection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/GPSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/GPSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/HobbiesSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/HobbiesSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/MedicationsSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/MedicationsSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/onboarding/sections/ProvidersSection.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/onboarding/sections/ProvidersSection.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/settings/AccountSettings.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/settings/AccountSettings.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/settings/NotificationsSettings.tsx..."

echo "  Writing src/pages/settings/PrivacySettings.tsx..."

echo "  Writing src/pages/settings/SettingsHome.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/settings/SettingsHome.tsx
echo "  Writing src/pages/settings/SubscriptionSettings.tsx..."
echo "" | base64 -d > src/pages/settings/SubscriptionSettings.tsx

echo ""
echo "✅ All done! 29 files created."
echo "Files created in:"
echo "  src/components/onboarding/ (5 shared components)"
echo "  src/pages/onboarding/      (7 onboarding pages)"
echo "  src/pages/onboarding/sections/ (11 section pages)"
echo "  src/pages/settings/        (5 settings pages)"
echo "  src/App.tsx                (router)"
echo ""
echo "Next step: restart your Replit dev server"
